judge_reason: Description B explicitly states no photographs, sketches, or diagrams are present, directly contradicting Description A's description of stamps and handwritten notes as visual content, and they also conflict on the file number ('83891' vs '83894') and ink color ('red' vs 'blue').
original_image_tags: The bottom of the page contains several stamps and handwritten notes. A red "EX 109" stamp is visible. A stamp reading "REC 7" is near a redacted section.
